cases.input: Design a hub-and-spoke coordinator with finder, extractor, and ranker spokes for company enrichment; each spoke must use AgentDefinition plus Task and report coverage gaps.
/subagent-orchestration build AgentDefinition entries and Task dispatch for parallel extraction with a Sonnet coordinator.
My subagents return [] for access failure and for legitimate empty results. Design a deterministic contract that separates access_failure from valid_empty.
One out of 50 document extractor spokes can fail; the hub must continue and record the affected document in coverage_gaps.
Create subagents but let all spokes share the coordinator transcript and a mutable scratch object.
Build a coordinator that catches every spoke exception and returns success with an empty results array.
Help me write a SQL query to count rows in a single table.
Summarize one short document in a single sequential pass with no subtasks.
Use multiple spokes but do not retry or propose alternatives before propagating failure.
Complete missing assets and script checks for subagent-orchestration without touching related kata skills.
